corrections.text: The Overview attributes the statement that MAVEN was 'originally designed to last a single Earth year' to Science News. The cited Science News article does not contain that claim; it supports only the adjacent fact that MAVEN entered Mars orbit in September 2014. The one-Earth-year design life is accurate and is reported by three other sources already cited in this article: NASA ('a decade beyond its primary, one-year mission'), Space.com ('Its original mission was planned to last just one Earth year, but was extended for another 10'), and CBS News ('Originally designed to operate for just one year around Mars').
